overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Batman walking and running through a rainy, dark Gotham City street at night. The scene features wet reflective pavement, tall buildings, construction cranes, and a large metallic sculpture, with heavy atmospheric fog and artificial street lighting creating a moody, cinematic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow downtown street between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily down the wet street with his cape flowing behind him, moving toward the construction crane visible in the distance

entered.detail: Tall dark building facade with illuminated windows lining the left side of the street
Tall building with warm interior lighting visible through windows on the right side
Large industrial construction crane silhouetted against the foggy sky at the end of the street
Classic street lamp emitting bright light through the rain and mist
Dark fire hydrant on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Batman walks down a narrow, rain-soaked street between towering Gotham buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the street lamps and building lights, while a large construction crane looms ahead in the foggy distance. The environment is enclosed and atmospheric with heavy rain falling.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening urban intersection approaching open plaza

events.description: narrow street opens up into a wider intersection area with more visible skyline

agents.ego_description: Batman continues forward as the street widens, approaching the intersection with buildings receding to reveal more of the cityscape

entered.detail: Cluster of tall modern buildings with illuminated windows visible ahead in the plaza area
Traffic signal pole with suspended signs crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens up from a narrow corridor into a wider intersection. The construction crane shifts to the left as Batman advances, and new buildings become visible in the plaza ahead. Traffic infrastructure becomes visible as the camera moves through the transition zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large metallic monument and sculpture

events.description: Batman transitions from walking to running, increasing speed significantly
Batman leaps into the air toward the metallic sculpture with cape billowing

agents.ego_description: Batman breaks into a run and leaps through the rain toward the large metallic sculpture, his cape flowing dynamically behind him

entered.detail: Large twisted metallic sculpture with organic branching structure rising from a plaza base, reflecting street lights
Low stone or concrete railing along the left edge of the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: Batman enters a wide open plaza dominated by a massive metallic sculpture on the right. He transitions from walking to running and finally leaps into the air toward the monument. The construction crane fades into the background as the camera focuses on the dramatic sculpture and the character's dynamic movement through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, rain-soaked street that gradually opens into a wide, dramatic urban plaza. It begins with Batman walking down a narrow corridor of towering buildings, where the wet asphalt reflects street lamps and a construction crane looms through the heavy fog. As he advances, the enclosed street expands into a wider intersection, shifting the crane to the left and revealing the surrounding traffic infrastructure and distant architecture. The scene then opens fully into a vast plaza dominated by a massive metallic sculpture on the right, where Batman transitions from a walk to a sprint. Finally, the camera captures his dynamic leap toward the monument as the construction crane fades into the background of the rainy night.
